allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/test-problems.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('count:', m.PROBLEMS.length\); const cc = {}; for \(const p of m.PROBLEMS\) for \(const c of p.concepts\) cc[c] = \(cc[c]||0\)+1; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cc\)\); for \(const p of m.PROBLEMS\) { try { p.expected\(p.aDefault\); p.expected\(p.aMin\); p.expected\(p.aMax\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('id', p.id, e.message\); } } console.log\('OK'\); }\);")
